task.title: Installing the ECOMAPP database
task.shortdesc: ECOMAPP database is hosted on Db2 for z/OS platform. You can install the ECOMAPP database within TSO/ISPF.

prereq.p: Before installing ECOMAPP, you must have these requirements:

ul.li: Access: You must have access to TSO/ISPF.
Db2: Version 13, subsystem ID <Your SSID>, Db2 software HLQ <Your DB2HLQ>, and a Db2 Connect license.
Storage: 100 tracks for DDL library, 50 tracks for JCL library, 500 MB DASD for tablespaces and indexes.

taskbody.context: Below are steps instructing you on how to install ECOMAPP database within TSO/ISPF.

step.cmd: Before uploading any files, you must customize the following placeholders throughout all DDL and JCL files:

chrow.chdesc: Application user group for DML access

step.cmd: Create an Initial Partitioned Data Set (PDS) in <Your HLQ>.ECOMAPP.ALOC. You must create one dataset and upload the ECOMALOC.jcl as a member of that dataset.Your new dataset can be accessed by <Your HLQ>.ECOMAPP.ALLOC(ECOMALOC). Configure your new dataset with the appropriate quantities, blocks, and record formattings below.

info.codeblock: Command ===> A Dataset Name: <Your HLQ>.ECOMAPP.ECOMALOC Management class . . . <blank> Storage class . . . . <blank> Volume serial . . . . <blank> Device type . . . . . <blank or SYSDA> Data class . . . . . . <blank> Space units . . . . . TRKS Primary quantity . . . 5 Secondary quantity . . 2 Directory blocks . . . 2 Record format . . . . FB Record length . . . . 80 Block size . . . . . . 3120 Data set name type . . PDS

substep.cmd: Log into TSO/ISPF and allocate the Initial PDS.
Upload ECOMALOC.jcl via Zowe or by pasting in the code in ISPF. You can find and edit it by using option 3.4 to find <Your HLQ>.ECOMAPP.ALLOC(ECOMALLOC).

step.cmd: Run ECOMALOC to create DDL and JCL libraries. This job creates the two main PDS libraries for the DDL and JCL files.

substep.cmd: Type SUB next to the ECOMALOC member.

step.cmd: Upload all SQL DDL files to the <Your HLQ>.ECOMAPP.DDL library. You can use Zowe to upload members directly from the project repository into the dataset.

substep.cmd: Navigate to the ISPF main menu and insert Option 2.
Paste in the new member contents.

step.cmd: Upload all JCL job files to the <Your HLQ>.ECOMAPP.JCL library using TSO/ISPF.

substep.cmd: Navigate to the ISPF main menu and insert Option 2.
Paste in the new member contents.

step.cmd: Submit the ECOMDDL job to create the database. Submit an ECOMDDL Job in TSO/ISPF.

substep.cmd: Insert B for browsing to see the members.
Type SUB next to the ECOMDDL member.

step.cmd: Verify the database creation in TSO/ISPF.

substep.cmd: Enter SELECT * FROM SYSIBM.SYSTABLES WHERE CREATOR = '<Your HLQ>';.
substep.stepresult: The result will show all of the tables in the database.

step.cmd: Initialize the Product catalog by submitting an ECPMINIT Job in TSO/ISPF.
Run statistics for optimal query performance by running ECOMRS.

substep.cmd: Type SUB next to ECOMRS member.
Check the job output in SDSF job status menu.
